recommendations.rationale: Tencent remains in a confirmed downtrend and is trading below both 20-day and 60-day averages, so the setup looks more like stabilization watch than immediate accumulation.
evidence: Latest close 504.5 is below ma20 515.265 and ma60 549.2883
Regime flag is downtrend with 60-day range position 0.1513
Volume ratio 20 is 0.7533, showing no strong reversal participation
risks: Downtrend can continue and push price to fresh 60-day lows
Low relative volume may mean rebounds lack conviction
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if price reclaims the 20-day average with stronger-than-average volume and the downtrend regime starts to break.

recommendations.rationale: Alibaba showed relative strength on the day, but the broader trend is still down and price remains below key moving averages, so it is an early watch rather than a buy signal.
evidence: 1-day move was +2.116%, best among the stocks in the snapshot
Latest close 125.5 is still below ma20 126.615 and ma60 145.1317
Regime flag remains downtrend and 60-day range position is only 0.1273
risks: Single-day rebound may fail inside an ongoing downtrend
Price remains far below ma60, limiting evidence of trend repair
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if follow-through lifts price above the 20-day average and holds there with improving volume.

recommendations.rationale: Xiaomi is the weakest name in the set, sitting at the bottom of its 60-day range and below both moving averages, which argues for staying out until a clear base forms.
evidence: 1-day move was -1.467%, the worst in the snapshot
Latest close 30.9 is below ma20 32.997 and ma60 34.665
60-day range position is 0.0025, essentially at the bottom of the range
Regime flag is downtrend
risks: Persistent weakness can lead to downside continuation rather than mean reversion
Buying near range lows without confirmation can trap capital in a falling trend
recommendations.invalidation: Avoid stance is invalidated only if price builds a base and reclaims the 20-day average with sustained volume improvement.

recommendations.rationale: Tracker Fund is the most stable setup in the group, trading above its 20-day average inside a range regime, which supports a hold rather than aggressive buying.
evidence: Latest close 26.16 is above ma20 25.662
Regime flag is range rather than downtrend
60-day range position 0.4195 places it near the middle of its recent band
1-day move was +0.538%, showing mild positive participation
risks: Price is still below ma60 26.4523, so upside may stall near resistance
Range regime can keep returns muted and choppy
recommendations.invalidation: Downgrade if price loses the 20-day average and the regime shifts from range back into a clearer downtrend.

recommendations.rationale: Hang Seng Tech ETF is showing a short-term bounce, but it remains below both key moving averages inside a downtrend, so it belongs on a rebound watchlist instead of in active accumulation.
evidence: 1-day move was +0.933%, leading the ETFs
Latest close 4.758 is slightly below ma20 4.7757 and well below ma60 5.1477
Regime flag is downtrend with 60-day range position 0.1705
risks: Sector ETF can reverse quickly if tech sentiment weakens again
Failure to reclaim ma20 would confirm the bounce as temporary
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if price retakes the 20-day average and starts building higher lows within the next several weeks.

recommendations.rationale: iShares Hang Seng TECH ETF mirrors the same tentative rebound profile as 3033.HK, but the broader trend is still negative and confirmation is missing.
evidence: 1-day move was +0.691%

Regime flag is downtrend with 60-day range position 0.1595
Volume ratio 20 is 0.6655, suggesting limited conviction
risks: Low relative volume weakens the case for a durable reversal
ETF remains exposed to broad Hang Seng Tech weakness
